mnemonics: XML: eXtract, Manipulate, Load with ElementTree
keyPoints: Use xml.etree.ElementTree to parse XML data into a tree structure
Navigate the tree using methods like .find(), .findall(), and iter()
Extract data from elements using .text for content and .get() for attributes
commonMistakes: Forgetting to handle namespaces correctly, leading to failed element searches
Assuming all elements exist and not using try-except blocks for missing data
Not specifying the correct encoding when reading the file, causing parsing errors
